channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Darty casse en deux le prix de cet excellent ancien smartphone haut de gamme de Google
item.description: Le Google Pixel 9 a certes été dépassé par le Pixel 10, et le Pixel 11 est l'un des smartphones les plus attendus de 2026. Pour autant, le Pixel 9 reste un modèle tout à fait recommandable, surtout quand son prix passe de 899 euros à 449 euros sur Darty.

item.title: Google Chrome rolls out a new tool to try and stop infostealer malware in its tracks
item.description: New Device Bound Session Credentials feature for Google Chrome is also coming to macOS soon.

item.title: Beyond no-log: Tor looks into seizure-proof servers that forget your data
item.description: The Tor Project is working with relay operators to develop "stateless" servers that run entirely in RAM. By forgetting all data upon reboot, these self-wiping relays will protect users and node operators from hardware seizures.

item.title: France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech
item.description: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.

item.title: Windows 11 : Microsoft admet un « problème » avec l’horloge, mais c’est fait exprès
item.description: Certains utilisateurs ont cru avoir repéré un nouveau bug sur Windows 11. En effet, l’heure affichée sur l’écran de verrouillage n’est pas toujours la même que celle renseignée sur le bureau. Sur son blog, Microsoft explique la raison.

item.title: YouTube Premium and YouTube Music are getting more expensive
item.description: The YouTube Premium individual plan is increasing from $13.99 to $15.99 per month, while the family plan is increasing from $22.99 to $26.99 per month.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch IPL 2026 for FREE
item.description: We've found a sneaky way to stream IPL 2026 live streams for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: J’ai testé le MGS6 EV : pourquoi ce concurrent du Tesla Model Y n’aimera pas beaucoup les grands trajets
item.description: MG est en pleine offensive dans sa gamme de voitures électriques. En parallèle du renouvellement de la MG4 et de l’arrivée de la MG4 Urban abordable, la marque lance le MGS6 EV, un SUV électrique familial. Peut-il rivaliser avec la cohorte menée par les Tesla Model Y, Volkswagen ID.4 et Peugeot E-5008 ? Voici notre essai.

item.title: 'Two Hells collide' — Doom: The Dark Ages and Diablo Immortal unite in a limited-time crossover event, The Slayer Reign, this month
item.description: Blizzard Entertainment has announced a new limited-time crossover event that brings Doom: The Dark Ages to Diablo Immortal.

item.title: Every fusion startup that has raised over $100M
item.description: Fusion startups have raised $7.1 billion to date, with the majority of it going to a handful of companies.

item.title: Votre Galaxy est-il dans la liste ? Samsung étend le support d’AirDrop à ces nouveaux modèles
item.description: Après les Galaxy S26, Samsung déploie actuellement le support d'AirDrop via la fonction Quick Share sur un plus grand nombre de smartphones Galaxy. Voici la nouvelle liste.

item.title: It’s Already Time to Start the Casting Rumors for Marvel’s ‘X-Men’ Movie
item.description: Plus, the team behind 'Final Destination: Bloodlines' is going to try taking on 'Metal Gear Solid'.

item.title: Why your Whoop might tell you to up your testosterone
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. Last week, our editor-in-chief Nilay Patel messaged me about his new Whoop band, which he'd gotten thanks to […]

item.title: Last 24 hours: Save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
item.description: This is it. Tonight is your last chance to lock in savings of up to $500 for your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass. These discounts end at 11:59 p.m. PT.

item.title: Spotify is rolling out new video controls, and as someone who hates its in-app music videos, I know this will be a huge hit
item.description: Spotify's new video controls allow you to disable Canvas videos, music videos, and other visual content for an audio-first experience.

item.title: 8 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (April 10)
item.description: From returning hit shows to a couple of intriguing new films, here's what you'll want to watch this weekend.

item.title: Sony Bravia Theater Bar 5 review: A basic TV sound booster
item.description:
Not everyone needs a $1,000 soundbar. It’s easy to argue the sonic superiority of those flagship models from Samsung, Sonos and Sony, but for some people a simple boost to their TV speakers can provide a world of difference. As part of its 2026 soundbar lineup, Sony debuted the Bravia Theater Bar 5: a $350 entry-level model that covers the basics and comes with a wireless subwoofer in the box. The real question here is how many features are you willing to live without.
The good: Sound quality, bass performance and setup The Theater Bar 5 is the most compact soundbar among Sony’s new models,...

item.title: Meta Ray-Ban : ces lunettes connectées très stylées sont à prix cassé chez Boulanger
item.description: Dévoilées il y a trois ans, les Ray-Ban Meta sont des lunettes connectées polyvalentes, capables de prendre des photos, de nous faire passer des appels ou encore de lancer nos playlists préférées. En ce moment, on les trouve à 269 euros au lieu de 359 euros chez Boulanger. Un autre modèle moins cher est aussi en promotion.

item.title: PSA: If you use the Meta AI app, your friends will find out and it will be embarrassing
item.description: Now that Meta released its Muse Spark model, more people are downloading the Meta AI app. And if you join the app, your friends will probably get an Instagram notification about it.

item.title: AdGuard VPN has a new app for iPhone — and you can try it out for 7 days for free
item.description: AdGuard VPN's latest iOS update (v2.10) is here, bringing a brand-new 7-day free trial to iPhone users. Here’s what you need to know about the latest stability fixes and how you can test out its premium features without spending a penny.

item.title: Currys refuses to end its Easter sale — I've found the 21 best tech deals that are still available
item.description: The Easter sale is still live at Currys, so I've looked through and picked out the 21 best deals on TVs, laptops, appliances, and more that are worth buying — but the sale will end soon.

item.title: Amazon is slashing prices on Garmin watches — save up to $350 on best-rated models for running, biking and hiking
item.description: Just in time for spring, Amazon has a huge sale on Garmin watches and I'm rounding up today's best deals, including up to $350 best-selling Garmin models.

item.title: Il joue à Red Dead Redemption 2 à 4 images par seconde et met 12 heures pour finir le premier chapitre
item.description: Un Youtubeur fait la preuve de sa patience exemplaire en parcourant le jeu Red Dead Redemption 2 sans dépasser les 4 ips. Une torture auto-infligée puisque son PC n'est pas si impuissant que ça.

item.title: Anker SOLIX Solarbank Max AC : la batterie solaire de 7 kWh qui s’adapte à votre installation existante
item.description: La Solarbank Max AC d'Anker SOLIX est une batterie plug-and-play de 7 kWh compatible avec les installations solaires existantes, disponible en France fin mai 2026.

item.title: Your AI initiative may be failing because you’re measuring it like a legacy business
item.description: The goal isn’t softer standards. It’s smarter ones. In operating reviews and boardrooms, I keep seeing the same pattern: leadership asks for rigor, teams deliver the numbers, and promising AI efforts get judged as underperforming before the organization has actually learned what it takes to make them real. Then someone pulls the plug, scales back the investment, or lets the initiative quietly expire....

item.title: Cloudflare made a WordPress for AI agents
item.description: Cloudflare, the cloud provider that connects millions of sites to the internet, wants to "fix" another digital giant: WordPress. It announced a new open-source system, called EmDash, that's supposed to address the "core problems that WordPress cannot solve" - and they want to do it by allowing AI agents to take control of your website. […]

item.title: Inspired to start running this summer? Here are 8 brilliant running shoes I'd recommend for beginners
item.description: Capable, affordable all-rounders to help you find your running groove.

item.title: « Combien ai-je dépensé en café cette année ? » : Revolut dévoile AIR, un assistant financier pas comme les autres
item.description: Depuis 2025, Revolut travaille sur un assistant IA totalement intégré à la banque en ligne et chargé de gérer nos finances personnelles. Cet assistant IA financier, c'est AIR, désormais déployé au Royaume-Uni.

item.title: Adobe Reader users beware — experts flag months-old security flaw using booby-trapped PDFs to scope out victims
item.description: Adobe Reader contains a zero-day that has been abused for some time, experts warn.

item.title: YouTube Premium’s US pricing is going up
item.description: Another day, another subscription price hike, this time for YouTube Premium. Every plan for YouTube’s ad-free tier is going up, and depending on which one you have, you could be paying as much as $4 per month more. As reported by 9to5Google, YouTube has started emailing subscribers about the price changes, rather than announcing them publicly, and some Reddit users have posted screenshots of the emails they’ve received. The emails say that the increases will kick in during the June 2026 billing period. Individual plans are now $16 per month, up from $14, so a $2 hike. If you’re on a YouTube Pr...

item.title: Onde de choc dans la recherche : Trump décide de rayer de la carte l'avenir scientifique de la Nasa !
item.description: Dans un contexte enthousiasmant pour la Nasa, avec Artemis II et l’annonce d’une présence humaine durable sur la Lune, l’administration Trump présente un projet budgétaire pour 2027 qui soulève de vives inquiétudes. Cette proposition vise à réduire de manière drastique le budget de la Nasa de...

item.title: Artemis II splashdown tracker: Watch live as the Orion crew returns to Earth
item.description: The NASA astronauts are set to return today, splashing down off the coast of California near San Diego. Here’s how you can follow along. Humanity is always aspiring to stretch itself to achieve new goals, including exploring new frontiers.

item.title: Coup dur pour Denuvo : à peine sorti, Resident Evil Requiem est le premier jeu de 2026 à être cracké
item.description: Le logiciel anti-piratage Denuvo, véritable bête noire des joueurs PC, vient de subir un revers historique. À peine 41 jours après sa sortie mondiale, Resident Evil Requiem a été totalement débarrassé de ses verrous numériques. Les protections de nouvelle génération ne sont plus infaillibles.

item.title: NASA used a 12-year-old GoPro to capture a sight called the ‘greatest gift’ by Artemis II pilot — and it used one extreme setting to get the shot
item.description: The Artemis II has provided iconic images throughout its moon fly-by mission, using a string of surprising cameras

item.title: iPhone owners urged to change this key privacy setting after FBI recovers suspect’s deleted Signal messages
item.description: Potential security flaws in both Signal and WhatsApp have been revealed, but one of them is fixable.

item.title: Interior design at 25,000 mph
item.description: As the Artemis II astronauts prepare for the most dramatic and potentially dangerous part of their mission - reentry into Earth's atmosphere - the eyes of the world will be on the Orion capsule and the people inside it. Getting glimpses into the capsule during the mission, the public has been able to observe the […]

item.title: Pour défendre l’iPhone, Apple fait tout pour obtenir les secrets de Samsung
item.description: Apple demande à son principal rival de lui fournir les preuves que les utilisateurs changent librement de smartphone. Le procès antitrust américain prend un tour inattendu.

item.title: Stop the presses — Microsoft is actually cutting cloud PC prices for SMBs, promises to make it 'more cost-effective for small and medium businesses'
item.description: Microsoft is cutting the price of its Cloud PC subscriptions by 20% by reducing performance, but the trade-offs are minimal.

item.title: Return to ‘Tron: Legacy’ With Hasbro’s Electric New Action Figures (Exclusive)
item.description: After trying to bring some classic 'Tron' figures to life, Hasbro is heading back to the grid for a spin with the stars of the 2010 cult classic.

item.title: Les meilleurs jeux gratuits sur Android en 2026
item.description: Si vous êtes à la recherche des meilleurs jeux sur Android sans débourser le moindre centime, voici une sélection de jeux gratuits qui vous permettront de passer le temps à moindres frais.

item.title: Microsoft has begun stripping out AI from Windows 11 — but it's already being criticized for not going far enough
item.description: Notepad change shows a rebrand of AI tools, not a removal, and it has skeptics worried.

item.title: Euphoria season 3 full release schedule: what is the launch date and time for episode 1 on HBO Max?
item.description: Here's when and where you'll be able to watch every episode of Euphoria season 3.

item.title: How to read Murder in Purple and Gold online from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to read Murder in Purple and Gold online from anywhere, the 14th entry in Lindsey Davis' beloved Flavia Albia series of historical crime novels.

item.title: Steam cleaners sold at Walmart and Target recalled after 161 people suffered burn injuries
item.description: The Bissell Homecare appliances, sold over a period of roughly a year and a half, can unexpectedly expel hot water due to a faulty attachment. Steam cleaning should be a low-risk activity, but that hasn’t been the case for some owners of Bissell’s Steam Shot products.

item.title: « Je sais maintenant que Jennifer Aniston peut tester la résistance d’une infrastructure » : ce GIF de Friends occupait 377 Go
item.description: Un GIF très populaire de Friends a permis aux développeurs de Discourse de découvrir les limites d'une fonction de Linux.
